name: ldpl-cmms
description: LDPL CMMS — Computerized Maintenance Management System

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,vite,desktop -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w @ldpl/cmms-server" "npm run dev -w @ldpl/cmms-client" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && npm run dev -w @ldpl/cmms-desktop"
scripts.start: concurrently -n server,desktop -c blue,magenta "npm run start -w @ldpl/cmms-server" "npm run start -w @ldpl/cmms-desktop"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @ldpl/cmms-client && npm run build -w @ldpl/cmms-server && npm run build -w @ldpl/cmms-desktop
scripts.package:win: npm run build -w @ldpl/cmms-client && npm run build -w @ldpl/cmms-desktop && npm run package:win -w @ldpl/cmms-desktop
scripts.package:linux: npm run build -w @ldpl/cmms-client && npm run build -w @ldpl/cmms-desktop && npm run package:linux -w @ldpl/cmms-desktop
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:generate -w @ldpl/cmms-server && npm run db:migrate -w @ldpl/cmms-server && npm run db:seed -w @ldpl/cmms-server
scripts.db:setup:prod: npm run db:generate -w @ldpl/cmms-server && npm run db:migrate:deploy -w @ldpl/cmms-server && npm run db:seed -w @ldpl/cmms-server
